englishDefinitions: To mentally intimidate or confuse someone so they lose confidence.
To figure out or understand someone's thoughts, motives, or behavior.
persianTranslation: از نظر روحی/ذهنی تحت فشار گذاشتن
examples: The crowd tried to psyche out the opposing team.
Don't let his comments psyche you out before the test.
She tried to psyche out the interviewer by staying calm.
